Module com.bifasico.soduko
Package com.bifasico.soduko.view

Class GameView

java.lang.Object
com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
public class GameView extends Object
Responsible for all JavaFX node creation, styling, and updates for the board grid and digit toolbar. No model logic, no event routing — only visual representation.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    GameView.CellState
    Visual states a cell can be rendered in.
    static interface 
    GameView.TriConsumer<A,B,C>
    Functional interface for three-argument event lambdas.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    animateHint(int row, int col, Cell cell)
    Applies a hint animation: indigo background fades back to normal over 1.2s.
    void
    buildGrid(GameView.TriConsumer<javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent,Integer,Integer> clickHandler, GameView.TriConsumer<javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent,Integer,Integer> keyHandler)
    Builds the 6x6 cell grid and attaches the provided event handlers.
    void
    clearSelection()
    Clears selection state (selected row/col/digit).
    int
    getSelectedDigit()
    Returns the currently selected digit from the toolbar (-1 if none).
    void
    markDigitCompleted(int digit)
    Marks a digit button as completed (outline only, greyed out) when all 6 instances of that digit are correctly placed on the board.
    void
    refreshCell(int row, int col, Cell cell, GameView.CellState state)
    Updates the visual state of a single cell.
    void
    renderBoard(Board board)
    Renders all cells according to current board state (after board generation).
    void
    selectDigitButton(int digit)
    Marks a digit button as selected (white fill).
    void
    updateSelection(int row, int col, Board board)
    Highlights the selected cell and dims its row/col peers.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameView

      public GameView(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane boardGrid, javafx.scene.layout.HBox toolbar, javafx.scene.control.Button[] digitButtons)

  • Method Details

    • buildGrid

      public void buildGrid(GameView.TriConsumer<javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent,Integer,Integer> clickHandler, GameView.TriConsumer<javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent,Integer,Integer> keyHandler)
      Builds the 6x6 cell grid and attaches the provided event handlers.
      Parameters:
      clickHandler - called when a cell is clicked (MouseEvent, row, col)
      keyHandler - called when a key is pressed on a focused cell (KeyEvent, row, col)

    • renderBoard

      public void renderBoard(Board board)
      Renders all cells according to current board state (after board generation).

    • refreshCell

      public void refreshCell(int row, int col, Cell cell, GameView.CellState state)
      Updates the visual state of a single cell.

    • updateSelection

      public void updateSelection(int row, int col, Board board)
      Highlights the selected cell and dims its row/col peers.

    • animateHint

      public void animateHint(int row, int col, Cell cell)
      Applies a hint animation: indigo background fades back to normal over 1.2s.

    • selectDigitButton

      public void selectDigitButton(int digit)
      Marks a digit button as selected (white fill).

    • markDigitCompleted

      public void markDigitCompleted(int digit)
      Marks a digit button as completed (outline only, greyed out) when all 6 instances of that digit are correctly placed on the board.

    • getSelectedDigit

      public int getSelectedDigit()
      Returns the currently selected digit from the toolbar (-1 if none).

    • clearSelection

      public void clearSelection()
      Clears selection state (selected row/col/digit).
